description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs: test:python2, test:python3, and test:vim, all running in the default test stage. Use the python:2.7-buster Docker image for test:python2 and execute pip install -r requirements.txt then flake8. Use the python:3-buster image for test:python3, run pip install -r requirements.txt then flake8, and configure a coverage regex /^TOTAL +\d+ +\d+ +(\d+%)$/ to capture total coverage. Use the python:3-buster image for test:vim, first apt-get update -qy && apt-get install -y vim-nox neovim, then pip install --upgrade neovim, then ./run_vim_tests.sh, then VIM_CMD=nvim ./run_vim_tests.sh, and finally ./stop_server.sh. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
